'''Enver Hoxha''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], stationed at the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]]. During the [[Jedi Temple Apprentice Tournament]] he was pitted against [[Pirt Neer]] in the eighth round. While their duel in the [[Jedi Temple refectory/Legends|refectory]] drew a lot of attention, it was cut short when [[Tallisibeth Enwandung-Esterhazy]] took his [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]]. He tapped out when Neer held her lightsaber to his neck.<ref name="YDR" />
